name: agentmirror-monorepo
description: AgentMirror — one canonical AGENTS.md, synced to every AI coding tool, kept drift-free and lean.

scripts.build: npm run build -w @agentmirror/core && npm run build -w agentmirror
scripts.typecheck: npm run typecheck -w @agentmirror/core && npm run typecheck -w agentmirror
